chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.S-100 of 2020. 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For Hearing of bail application 05-06-2020. Mr. Zulfiquar Ali Channa advocate for petitioners. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, AAG. >>>>>...<<<<< At the very outset it is stated by learned AAG for the official respondents that official respondents have no intention to harass the petitioners in any manner at the instance of anyone and will protect them in accordance with law, in event of need. Learned counsel for the petitioners shown his satisfaction to the statement so made by learned AAG. Instant petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A
